about:
A Passionate and self-driven B.E. Mechanical Engineering student (3rd Year, Lateral Entry) at PSG 
College of Technology with strong interests in rocket propulsion, aerostructures, and thermal systems. 
Demonstrated academic and project excellence through research publications, national-level conference 
participations, and hands-on project experience. Skilled in CAD tools (Creo, SolidWorks), CFD/FEA 
simulation (ANSYS, ICEM/Fluent), 3D printing, and CubeSat fabrication, with practical exposure to 
cryogenic propulsion and UAV systems. Aspiring to build a career in space science and research, with a 
focus on advanced propulsion systems, aerostructural design, and satellite thermal control across the 
aerospace and space technology domain  Exploration of Various Types of Electric Propulsion Systems and Their Advantages in 
High-Powered Rocketry 
• 2D Comparative Performance Analysis on a Numerically Computed Aerospike Nozzle Plug 
• Analysis of Testing Passive and Active Thermal Control Strategies for Satellites 
. 
• Direct Fusion Drive for Long Duration Spaceflight.
